question_text: Two plastic rods are rubbed with cloth. Rod A becomes negatively charged and Rod B also becomes negatively charged. What will happen when the two rods are brought close together?
correct_answer: The rods will repel each other (push away from each other)
explanation: Like charges repel each other. Since both rods are negatively charged, they have the same type of charge and will push apart. Unlike charges (opposite charges) attract each other.
